scripts.dev:full: powershell -Command "Get-Content .env | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^[^#].*?=') { $parts = $_ -split '=', 2; $name = $parts[0].Trim(); $value = $parts[1].Trim().Trim('"'); if ($name -eq 'SHEETS_API_KEY') { Set-Item -Path ('Env:' + $name) -Value $value } } }; npx npm-run-all -p --print-label dev emulators"
scripts.test:integration: cross-env LIVEGRID_TEST_MODE=true LIVEGRID_TEST_MESSAGING=stub LIVEGRID_TEST_FIXTURES_DIR=functions/test-fixtures GCLOUD_PROJECT=livegrid-c33c6 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore,hosting,auth "npm run test:integration:inner"
scripts.test:e2e: cross-env VITE_USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=true VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=livegrid-c33c6 VITE_FUNCTIONS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5001/livegrid-c33c6/us-central1 VITE_FIREBASE_EMULATOR_AUTH=http://localhost:9099 VITE_FIREBASE_EMULATOR_FIRESTORE=localhost:8080 firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore,auth "playwright test"
scripts.test:build: npm run build:ci && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.test:predeploy: npm run test:run && npm run test:build && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
